summary: Iteration 70 - CRITICAL UI REPAIR Testing: HUD Decoupling & Map Integration. Successfully verified God Mode cyan banner with EXIT button, ConditionsModal as mandatory gatekeeper, Settings Modal flow, and Photo Tools workflow. MapLiveIndicator and MapEndSessionButton code verified but only visible when photographer has active session.

minor.issue: Multiple 404 and 400 errors visible in console during navigation - may be expected for missing data

issues: Map tiles not loading (black area) - may be Leaflet initialization issue or tile server connectivity

god_mode_cyan_banner.details: PersonaMaskBanner.js - Cyan banner appears at top when a persona is selected in God Mode. Shows 'VIEWING AS: [PERSONA]' with dropdown and EXIT button. Banner uses cyan gradient background. data-testid='persona-mask-banner' working correctly.

god_mode_exit_button.details: EXIT button (data-testid='exit-persona-mask') works correctly - clicking it closes the banner and exits persona mode. Close logic is isolated from session states.

god_mode_persona_dropdown.details: Dropdown (data-testid='persona-banner-dropdown') shows all available personas: God Mode (Default), Verified Pro Surfer, Verified Pro Photographer, Regular Photographer, Hobbyist Photographer, etc. Hot-switching between personas works correctly.

conditions_modal_gatekeeper.details: ConditionsModal.js (data-testid='conditions-modal') appears after Settings Modal in Photo Tools tab. Shows 'Conditions Check' title, spot name ('Going live at [SPOT]'), REQUIRED notice for photo/video, Take Photo button, Record Video button, Upload from gallery, Spot Notes textarea, and Go Live button (DISABLED until media uploaded). Warning message 'Add a condition photo or video to enable Go Live' displayed.

conditions_modal_go_live_disabled.details: Go Live button (data-testid='go-live-final-btn') is disabled by default until media is uploaded. This enforces mandatory photo/video upload before photographer icon appears on map.

settings_modal_live_session_rates.details: Settings Modal shows 'Live Session Rates' with: Surf Spot dropdown (data-testid='surf-spot-select'), Session Buy-in ($25), Photos Included (3), Live Session Photo Rates ($5/photo), Max Surfers (10), Duration (2 hrs), Auto-Accept toggle. 'Next: Add Conditions' button (data-testid='go-live-confirm-btn') advances to ConditionsModal.

photo_tools_tab.details: Photo Tools expands to show: My Gallery, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions (highlighted when active), Earnings Dashboard. Go Live button (data-testid='go-live-btn') triggers the sequential permission flow.

map_live_indicator.details: MapLiveIndicator component (data-testid='map-live-indicator') correctly integrated in MapPage.js. Shows soft red pulsing 'LIVE' indicator with session timer. Only visible when currentUserShooting is truthy (photographer has active session).

map_end_session_button.details: MapEndSessionButton (data-testid='map-end-session-btn') correctly placed in top-right of map header. Only visible when photographer is live. Contains Square icon with 'End' text.

end_session_modal.details: EndSessionModal.js (data-testid='end-session-modal') imported and integrated. Shows session summary (duration, surfers, earnings), 'End Session' button (data-testid='confirm-end-session-btn'), 'Keep Shooting' button (data-testid='cancel-end-session-btn'). Redirects to /impacted after confirm.

map_page_ui.details: Map page shows 'Live Map' header, filter buttons (All, Surf Spots, Photographers, Request a Pro), shooting count indicator ('0 shooting'), GPS button (data-testid='gps-location-btn'), Request a Pro button (data-testid='request-pro-btn').

action_items: Map tiles not loading (black area in map view) - investigate Leaflet/tile server connectivity
Multiple 404/400 console errors during navigation - may need investigation for missing endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: PersonaMaskBanner correctly isolates God Mode close logic from session states - exitPersonaMode() only clears persona state, doesn't affect session data
ConditionsModal correctly implements canGoLive = !!conditionMedia logic - Go Live disabled until media uploaded
MapLiveIndicator placed inside map UI layer (not external bar) using absolute positioning with z-index
MapEndSessionButton renders in top-right header when currentUserShooting is truthy
Settings Modal flow: Go Live -> Location Permission -> Settings Modal -> ConditionsModal -> Final Go Live

test_credentials.admin_user: kelly@surf.com / test-shaka (Kelly Slater, role: Pro Surfer with God Mode access)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All key features verified: 1) God Mode cyan banner with EXIT button works correctly - selecting a persona shows banner, EXIT button closes it. 2) ConditionsModal is the mandatory gatekeeper requiring photo/video before Go Live is enabled. 3) Settings Modal shows Live Session Rates with surf spot selection. 4) MapLiveIndicator and MapEndSessionButton only show when photographer has active session (currentUserShooting truthy). 5) EndSessionModal triggers on End button click and redirects to /impacted. Map tiles may have loading issues - black area visible instead of map tiles.
notes: MapLiveIndicator, MapEndSessionButton, and EndSessionModal were code-verified but not UI-tested since they require an active photographer session. The Go Live flow stops at ConditionsModal because camera/media upload is required. All data-testids are properly implemented for automated testing.
